external_attention_inputs.signal: Agent memory evaluation is moving toward self-evolving memory across in-episode/cross-episode and knowledge/execution axes, with current memory systems still not a general solution.
Agent memory is being framed as learned structured operations such as ADD, UPDATE, DELETE, and NOOP rather than passive retrieval only.
Self-evolving memory architectures now optimize retrieval configuration using failure logs, guarded meta-analysis, and revert-on-regression safeguards.
Agentic memory systems are organizing memories as linked evolving knowledge networks rather than flat vector stores.

value.projection_contract: Project this only as agent_memory_temporal_conflict_replay synthetic receipts folded under agent_route_observability_runtime, external_boundary_anti_corruption_runtime, and bridge_phase_continuity_runtime. It is not a live memory product, private transcript export, authoritative active-injection lane, or claim that memory improves agents generally.
